name: tally-ts
background: Created and published a Deno-first TypeScript library for counting graphemes, words, sentences, paragraphs, lines, and character categories in user-provided text. The package uses the Intl.Segmenter web API for locale-aware Unicode segmentation, ships dependency-free runtime code to JSR and npm, and supports downstream tools like the Tally web app with reusable text statistics APIs and multilingual fixture coverage.
